name: figa
title: Figa
description: Access your Figa workspace from Raycast.
author: figa

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Figa workspace API key. Create a dedicated key in workspace settings.

commands.name: show-workspace-context
commands.title: Show Workspace Context
commands.description: Validate the configured Figa API key and show workspace context.

commands.name: search-expenses
commands.title: Search Expenses
commands.description: Search current-month Figa expenses and quick views.

commands.name: show-monthly-summary
commands.title: Show Monthly Summary
commands.description: Review recent monthly expense totals for the current workspace.

commands.name: create-expense
commands.title: Create Expense
commands.description: Create a Figa expense in the current workspace.

commands.name: search-categories
commands.title: Search Categories
commands.description: Search Figa categories for the current workspace.

commands.name: search-recipients
commands.title: Search Recipients
commands.description: Search Figa recipients for the current workspace.
